200â†’
   201â†’// executeLLMExecBranch executes an LLM-based code generation branch
   202â†’func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeLLMExecBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   203â†’	// Step 1: Render LLM exec assets
   204â†’	hclPath, err := o.runner.RenderLLMExecAssets(branch.ID)
   205â†’	if err != nil {
   206â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   207â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to render LLM exec assets: %v", err)
   208â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   209â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   210â†’		return result
   211â†’	}
   212â†’
   213â†’	// Step 2: Generate unique run ID for this branch
   214â†’	runID := fmt.Sprintf("llm-exec-%s-%d", branch.ID, time.Now().Unix())
   215â†’
   216â†’	// Step 3: Substitute environment variables in HCL template
   217â†’	renderedHCLPath, err := substituteHCLTemplate(hclPath, runID)
   218â†’	if err != nil {
   219â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   220â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to substitute HCL template: %v", err)
   221â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   222â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   223â†’		return result
   224â†’	}
   225â†’
   226â†’	// Step 4: Submit job to Nomad and wait for completion
   227â†’	timeout := 30 * time.Minute
   228â†’	if err := orchestration.SubmitAndWaitTerminal(renderedHCLPath, timeout); err != nil {
   229â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   230â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job failed: %v", err)
   231â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   232â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   233â†’		return result
   234â†’	}
   235â†’
   236â†’	// Step 5: Check for generated diff.patch artifact
   237â†’	diffPath := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(renderedHCLPath), "out", "diff.patch")
   238â†’	if _, err := os.Stat(diffPath); err != nil {
   239â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   240â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job completed but no diff.patch found: %v", err)
   241â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   242â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   243â†’		return result
   244â†’	}
   245â†’
   246â†’	result.Status = "completed"
   247â†’	result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("LLM exec job completed successfully, diff.patch at: %s", diffPath)
   248â†’	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   249â†’	result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   250â†’	return result
   251â†’}
   252â†’
   253â†’// executeORWGenBranch executes an OpenRewrite recipe generation and application branch
   254â†’func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeORWGenBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   255â†’	// Step 1: Render ORW apply assets
   256â†’	hclPath, err := o.runner.RenderORWApplyAssets(branch.ID)
   257â†’	if err != nil {
   258â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   259â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to render ORW apply assets: %v", err)
   260â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   261â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   262â†’		return result
   263â†’	}
   264â†’
   265â†’	// Step 2: Read HCL template and substitute recipe-specific variables
   266â†’	hclBytes, err := os.ReadFile(hclPath)
   267â†’	if err != nil {
   268â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   269â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to read ORW HCL template: %v", err)
   270â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   271â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   272â†’		return result
   273â†’	}
   274â†’
   275â†’	// Get recipe configuration from branch inputs
   276â†’	rclass := ""
   277â†’	rcoords := ""
   278â†’	rtimeout := "10m"
   279â†’
   280â†’	if inputs, ok := branch.Inputs["recipe_config"].(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   281â†’		if class, ok := inputs["class"].(string); ok {
   282â†’			rclass = class
   283â†’		}
   284â†’		if coords, ok := inputs["coords"].(string); ok {
   285â†’			rcoords = coords
   286â†’		}
   287â†’		if timeout, ok := inputs["timeout"].(string); ok {
   288â†’			rtimeout = timeout
   289â†’		}
   290â†’	}
   291â†’
   292â†’	// Perform recipe-specific substitution
   293â†’	rendered := strings.NewReplacer(
   294â†’		"${RECIPE_CLASS}", rclass,
   295â†’		"${RECIPE_COORDS}", rcoords,
   296â†’		"${RECIPE_TIMEOUT}", rtimeout,
   297â†’	).Replace(string(hclBytes))
   298â†’
   299â†’	// Write substituted HCL to a new file
   300â†’	renderedHCLPath := strings.ReplaceAll(hclPath, ".rendered.hcl", ".rendered.submitted.hcl")
   301â†’	if err := os.WriteFile(renderedHCLPath, []byte(rendered), 0644); err != nil {
   302â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   303â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("failed to write substituted ORW HCL: %v", err)
   304â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   305â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   306â†’		return result
   307â†’	}
   308â†’
   309â†’	// Step 3: Submit job to Nomad and wait for completion
   310â†’	timeout := 30 * time.Minute
   311â†’	if err := orchestration.SubmitAndWaitTerminal(renderedHCLPath, timeout); err != nil {
   312â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   313â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job failed: %v", err)
   314â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   315â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   316â†’		return result
   317â†’	}
   318â†’
   319â†’	// Step 4: Check for generated diff.patch artifact
   320â†’	diffPath := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(renderedHCLPath), "out", "diff.patch")
   321â†’	if _, err := os.Stat(diffPath); err != nil {
   322â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   323â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job completed but no diff.patch found: %v", err)
   324â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   325â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   326â†’		return result
   327â†’	}
   328â†’
   329â†’	result.Status = "completed"
   330â†’	result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("ORW apply job completed successfully, diff.patch at: %s", diffPath)
   331â†’	result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   332â†’	result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   333â†’	return result
   334â†’}

   336â†’// executeHumanStepBranch handles human intervention branches with Git-based manual intervention workflow
   337â†’func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeHumanStepBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   338â†’	// Parse timeout from branch inputs
   339â†’	timeout := 30 * time.Minute // default timeout
   340â†’	if timeoutStr, ok := branch.Inputs["timeout"].(string); ok {
   341â†’		if parsedTimeout, err := time.ParseDuration(timeoutStr); err == nil {
   342â†’			timeout = parsedTimeout
   343â†’		}
   344â†’	}
   345â†’
   346â†’	// Create timeout context for this branch
   347â†’	branchCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, timeout)
   348â†’	defer cancel()
   349â†’
   350â†’	// Get build error context
   351â†’	buildError, _ := branch.Inputs["buildError"].(string)
   352â†’	if buildError == "" {
   353â†’		buildError = "Build failure - human intervention required"
   354â†’	}
   355â†’
   356â†’	// Check if runner is available for production mode
   357â†’	if o.runner == nil {
   358â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   359â†’		result.Notes = "human-step branches requires production runner (not available in test mode)"
   360â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   361â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   362â†’		return result
   363â†’	}
   364â†’
   365â†’	gitProvider := o.runner.GetGitProvider()
   366â†’	buildChecker := o.runner.GetBuildChecker()
   367â†’	_ = o.runner.GetWorkspaceDir() // Available if needed for future enhancements
   368â†’
   369â†’	if gitProvider == nil || buildChecker == nil {
   370â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   371â†’		result.Notes = "human-step branches require GitProvider and BuildChecker"
   372â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   373â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   374â†’		return result
   375â†’	}
   376â†’
   377â†’	// Step 1: Create intervention branch name
   378â†’	interventionBranch := fmt.Sprintf("human-intervention-%s", branch.ID)
   379â†’
   380â†’	// Step 2: Create MR for human intervention
   381â†’	mrConfig := provider.MRConfig{
   382â†’		RepoURL:      o.runner.GetTargetRepo(),
   383â†’		SourceBranch: interventionBranch,
   384â†’		TargetBranch: "main",
   385â†’		Title:        fmt.Sprintf("Human Intervention Required: %s", branch.ID),
   386â†’		Description:  fmt.Sprintf("Build Error:\n```\n%s\n```\n\nPlease fix the build failure and commit your changes to this branch for automated validation.", buildError),
   387â†’		Labels:       []string{"ploy", "human-intervention"},
   388â†’	}
   389â†’
   390â†’	mrResult, err := gitProvider.CreateOrUpdateMR(branchCtx, mrConfig)
   391â†’	if err != nil {
   392â†’		result.Status = "failed"
   393â†’		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Failed to create human intervention MR: %v", err)
   394â†’		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   395â†’		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   396â†’		return result
   397â†’	}
   398â†’
   399â†’	// Step 3: Poll for manual commits and validate build
   400â†’	pollInterval := 30 * time.Second
   401â†’	ticker := time.NewTicker(pollInterval)
   402â†’	defer ticker.Stop()
   403â†’
   404â†’	for {
   405â†’		select {
   406â†’		case <-branchCtx.Done():
   407â†’			// Timeout reached
   408â†’			result.Status = "timeout"
   409â†’			result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Human intervention timed out after %v", timeout)
   410â†’			result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   411â†’			result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   412â†’			return result
   413â†’
   414â†’		case <-ticker.C:
   415â†’			// Check if human made changes by attempting build validation
   416â†’			buildConfig := common.DeployConfig{
   417â†’				App:           branch.ID,
   418â†’				Lane:          "A", // Simple build validation
   419â†’				Environment:   "dev",
   420â†’				ControllerURL: "", // Will be set by build checker if needed
   421â†’				Timeout:       10 * time.Minute,
   422â†’			}
   423â†’
   424â†’			buildResult, err := buildChecker.CheckBuild(branchCtx, buildConfig)
   425â†’			if err != nil {
   426â†’				continue // Build check failed, keep polling
   427â†’			}
   428â†’
   429â†’			if buildResult != nil && buildResult.Success {
   430â†’				// Human fixed the build!
   431â†’				result.Status = "completed"
   432â†’				result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Human intervention successful via MR %s - build now passes", mrResult.MRURL)
   433â†’				result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   434â†’				result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   435â†’				return result
   436â†’			}
   437â†’
   438â†’			// Build still fails, continue polling
   439â†’		}

454â†’// Test human-step branch full workflow (RED phase - failing tests for expected behavior)
   455â†’func TestHumanStepBranchFullWorkflow(t *testing.T) {
   456â†’	t.Run("human-step creates MR with correct configuration", func(t *testing.T) {
   457â†’		// This test documents expected MR creation behavior - will fail until production integration
   458â†’		mockGitProvider := &MockGitProvider{
   459â†’			MRResult: &provider.MRResult{
   460â†’				MRURL:   "https://gitlab.com/test/repo/-/merge_requests/42",
   461â†’				MRID:    42,
   462â†’				Created: true,
   463â†’			},
   464â†’		}
   465â†’
   466â†’		orchestrator := &fanoutOrchestrator{
   467â†’			runner: &MockProductionBranchRunner{
   468â†’				GitProviderMock:  mockGitProvider,
   469â†’				BuildCheckerMock: &MockBuildChecker{},
   470â†’				TargetRepo:       "https://gitlab.com/test/repo.git",
   471â†’			},
   472â†’		}
   473â†’
   474â†’		branchSpec := BranchSpec{
   475â†’			ID:   "human-fix-001",
   476â†’			Type: "human-step",
   477â†’			Inputs: map[string]interface{}{
   478â†’				"timeout":    "15m",
   479â†’				"buildError": "Compilation failed: undefined method 'getFoo()'",
   480â†’			},
   481â†’		}
   482â†’
   483â†’		result := BranchResult{
   484â†’			ID:        branchSpec.ID,
   485â†’			StartedAt: time.Now(),
   486â†’			Status:    "pending",
   487â†’		}
   488â†’
   489â†’		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 1*time.Second)
   490â†’		defer cancel()
   491â†’
   492â†’		actualResult := orchestrator.executeHumanStepBranch(ctx, branchSpec, result)
   493â†’
   494â†’		// Expected behavior - MR should be created
   495â†’		assert.True(t, mockGitProvider.MRCalled, "MR should be created")
   496â†’		assert.Equal(t, "https://gitlab.com/test/repo.git", mockGitProvider.MRConfig.RepoURL, "should use correct repo URL")
   497â†’		assert.Equal(t, "human-intervention-human-fix-001", mockGitProvider.MRConfig.SourceBranch, "should create intervention branch")
   498â†’		assert.Equal(t, "main", mockGitProvider.MRConfig.TargetBranch, "should target main branch")
   499â†’		assert.Contains(t, mockGitProvider.MRConfig.Title, "Human Intervention Required", "MR title should indicate intervention needed")
   500â†’		assert.Contains(t, mockGitProvider.MRConfig.Description, "getFoo()", "MR description should contain build error")
   501â†’		assert.Contains(t, mockGitProvider.MRConfig.Labels, "human-intervention", "should have human-intervention label")
   502â†’
   503â†’		// Will timeout since no human fixes the build in test mode
   504â†’		assert.Equal(t, "timeout", actualResult.Status, "should timeout waiting for human fix")
   505â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "timed out", "should indicate timeout occurred")
   506â†’	})
   507â†’
   508â†’	t.Run("human-step detects successful manual fix", func(t *testing.T) {
   509â†’		// This test documents expected success behavior - will fail until production integration
   510â†’		mockBuildChecker := &MockBuildChecker{
   511â†’			BuildResult: &common.DeployResult{Success: true}, // Simulate human fixing the build
   512â†’		}
   513â†’
   514â†’		mockGitProvider := &MockGitProvider{
   515â†’			MRResult: &provider.MRResult{
   516â†’				MRURL:   "https://gitlab.com/test/repo/-/merge_requests/43",
   517â†’				MRID:    43,
   518â†’				Created: true,
   519â†’			},
   520â†’		}
   521â†’
   522â†’		orchestrator := &fanoutOrchestrator{
   523â†’			runner: &MockProductionBranchRunner{
   524â†’				GitProviderMock:  mockGitProvider,
   525â†’				BuildCheckerMock: mockBuildChecker,
   526â†’				TargetRepo:       "https://gitlab.com/test/repo.git",
   527â†’			},
   528â†’		}
   529â†’
   530â†’		branchSpec := BranchSpec{
   531â†’			ID:   "human-fix-002",
   532â†’			Type: "human-step",
   533â†’			Inputs: map[string]interface{}{
   534â†’				"timeout":    "30s", // Short timeout for test
   535â†’				"buildError": "Build failed: missing dependency",
   536â†’			},
   537â†’		}
   538â†’
   539â†’		result := BranchResult{
   540â†’			ID:        branchSpec.ID,
   541â†’			StartedAt: time.Now(),
   542â†’			Status:    "pending",
   543â†’		}
   544â†’
   545â†’		ctx := context.Background()
   546â†’		actualResult := orchestrator.executeHumanStepBranch(ctx, branchSpec, result)
   547â†’
   548â†’		// Expected behavior - should detect successful fix
   549â†’		assert.Equal(t, "completed", actualResult.Status, "should complete when build succeeds")
   550â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "Human intervention successful", "should indicate success")
   551â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, mockGitProvider.MRResult.MRURL, "should reference MR URL")
   552â†’		assert.True(t, actualResult.Duration > 0, "should record execution duration")
   553â†’		assert.False(t, actualResult.FinishedAt.IsZero(), "should record finish time")
   554â†’	})
   555â†’
   556â†’	t.Run("human-step handles MR creation failure", func(t *testing.T) {
   557â†’		// This test documents expected error handling - will fail until production integration
   558â†’		mockGitProvider := &MockGitProvider{
   559â†’			MRError: fmt.Errorf("failed to create MR: repository not found"),
   560â†’		}
   561â†’
   562â†’		orchestrator := &fanoutOrchestrator{
   563â†’			runner: &MockProductionBranchRunner{
   564â†’				GitProviderMock:  mockGitProvider,
   565â†’				BuildCheckerMock: &MockBuildChecker{},
   566â†’				TargetRepo:       "https://gitlab.com/invalid/repo.git",
   567â†’			},
   568â†’		}
   569â†’
   570â†’		branchSpec := BranchSpec{
   571â†’			ID:   "human-fix-003",
   572â†’			Type: "human-step",
   573â†’			Inputs: map[string]interface{}{
   574â†’				"buildError": "Test error",
   575â†’			},
   576â†’		}
   577â†’
   578â†’		result := BranchResult{
   579â†’			ID:        branchSpec.ID,
   580â†’			StartedAt: time.Now(),
   581â†’			Status:    "pending",
   582â†’		}
   583â†’
   584â†’		ctx := context.Background()
   585â†’		actualResult := orchestrator.executeHumanStepBranch(ctx, branchSpec, result)
   586â†’
   587â†’		// Expected behavior - should fail gracefully when MR creation fails
   588â†’		assert.Equal(t, "failed", actualResult.Status, "should fail when MR creation fails")
   589â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "Failed to create human intervention MR", "should indicate MR creation failure")
   590â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "repository not found", "should include underlying error")
   591â†’	})
   592â†’
   593â†’	t.Run("human-step respects timeout configuration", func(t *testing.T) {
   594â†’		// This test documents expected timeout behavior - will fail until production integration
   595â†’		orchestrator := &fanoutOrchestrator{
   596â†’			runner: &MockProductionBranchRunner{
   597â†’				GitProviderMock: &MockGitProvider{
   598â†’					MRResult: &provider.MRResult{MRURL: "https://gitlab.com/test/repo/-/merge_requests/44", MRID: 44, Created: true},
   599â†’				},
   600â†’				BuildCheckerMock: &MockBuildChecker{BuildResult: &common.DeployResult{Success: false}}, // Build never succeeds
   601â†’				TargetRepo:       "https://gitlab.com/test/repo.git",
   602â†’			},
   603â†’		}
   604â†’
   605â†’		branchSpec := BranchSpec{
   606â†’			ID:   "human-fix-004",
   607â†’			Type: "human-step",
   608â†’			Inputs: map[string]interface{}{
   609â†’				"timeout":    "100ms", // Very short timeout for quick test
   610â†’				"buildError": "Timeout test error",
   611â†’			},
   612â†’		}
   613â†’
   614â†’		result := BranchResult{
   615â†’			ID:        branchSpec.ID,
   616â†’			StartedAt: time.Now(),
   617â†’			Status:    "pending",
   618â†’		}
   619â†’
   620â†’		ctx := context.Background()
   621â†’		actualResult := orchestrator.executeHumanStepBranch(ctx, branchSpec, result)
   622â†’
   623â†’		// Expected behavior - should timeout after configured duration
   624â†’		assert.Equal(t, "timeout", actualResult.Status, "should timeout after configured duration")
   625â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "Human intervention timed out", "should indicate timeout occurred")
   626â†’		assert.Contains(t, actualResult.Notes, "100ms", "should mention the timeout duration")
   627â†’	})

content.text: Now let me examine the Git diff to see all changes and check for any security or functionality issues:
